race.comment: FRED THE FOX (1) is a talented type and proved too classy last time to win by 2.75 lengths at this track in a handy 19.69 beating Red Hot Pretty. Has performed well from this box with a win and three minor placings to his name from seven starts. Can continue the winning form. ANGRY FRANKY (2) has mixed form recently, finishing fifth (19.85) in a Grade 5 at this track latest but did run well two back when in the frame. Can improve sharply here. GAME OF PHONES (6) had a tricky draw but scored by 0.8 lengths (22.68) at Shepparton in Grade 5. Is yet to find the frame here from six. Can make it two on the bounce. CINDY CABANG (4) has strong claims after a top-three finish last time out.

runners.name: Cindy Cabang
runners.breeding: b OUT OF RANGE (AUS)-STARS AND LIGHTS (AUS)

runners.name: Jazz Hands
runners.breeding: b JS FLAMIN ACE (AUS)-LITTLE BIT SWEET (AUS)
